top_findings: Missing canonical link tags on root pages
Outdated XML sitemap missing five clean URLs
Missing JSON-LD schemas on homepage and original reviews
Missing Open Graph tags on original review articles
quick_wins: Inject self-referencing canonical tags into root files
Update sitemap.xml with new clean URLs

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Robots.txt references the sitemap and blocks /admin
Redirection rules in .htaccess strip file extensions correctly

findings.title: Missing Canonicals on Root Pages
findings.description: index.html, games.html, guides.html, and news.html do not contain canonical link tags.
findings.recommendation: Inject self-referencing canonical links in the head of each root HTML file.

findings.title: Outdated XML Sitemap
findings.description: sitemap.xml has not been updated and is missing five new clean URLs.

categories.name: Schema & Structured Data
what_works: Recent guides include BlogPosting and FAQPage structured schemas

findings.title: Missing JSON-LD Schemas
findings.description: The homepage, the three category files, and the six original review pages lack any structured data.
findings.recommendation: Inject WebSite, CollectionPage, and BlogPosting schemas where appropriate.

categories.name: Social Metadata
what_works: Newly generated guides feature Open Graph preview tags

findings.title: Missing Open Graph Tags
findings.description: The homepage, the three category files, and the six original reviews do not have Open Graph properties.
findings.recommendation: Inject og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, and og:type tags.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Inject canonical tags into root files
Add the 5 missing clean URLs to sitemap.xml

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add WebSite and CollectionPage JSON-LD schemas to root files
Add BlogPosting JSON-LD schemas to the 6 original review articles

phases.name: Phase 3: Social Meta Integration
items: Add Open Graph metadata to all pages lacking them
